title: To Mistress Dorothy Parsons.
content:
If thou ask me, dear, wherefore
    I do write of thee no more,
    I must answer, sweet, thy part
    Less is here than in my heart.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "To Mistress Dorothy Parsons."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
